init_hook: if [ "${CI:-false}" != true ] && [ ! -f .env ]; then echo 'Local environment is not initialized; run: devbox run setup' >&2; fi

setup: if ! grep -Eq '^APP_KEY=base64:.+' .env; then php artisan key:generate --no-interaction; fi
if ! pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet; then devbox services start postgresql; fi
for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet && break; sleep 1; done

psql --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --dbname=postgres --tuples-only --no-align --command="SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'holizuki'" | grep -qx 1 || createdb --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki holizuki
dev: if ! pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --quiet; then devbox services start postgresql; fi
pg_isready --host=127.0.0.1 --port="$PGPORT" --username=holizuki --dbname=holizuki --quiet || { echo 'PostgreSQL is not initialized; run: devbox run setup' >&2; exit 1; }
scripts.browser:install: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Linux ]; then npm run browser:install:ci; else npm run browser:install; fi
